results.rendered_html:
atula (3. a + tulā)
1〉 adj. f. ā unvergleichlich  N. 12,44 . 24,33 .  INDR. 3,10 .  HIḌ. 2,31 .  R. 1,5,18 . 5,13,19 .  VIŚV. 4,13 . 13,21 .
— 2〉 m. Name einer Pflanze, Sesamum orientale,  ŚABDAC. _im_ ŚKDR. ; s. tila.

results.rendered_html:
atula a. [na. ba.] Unequalled, unsurpassed, matchless, peerless, incomparable, very great; bhayamatulaṃ gurulokāt  Pt. 5. 31 ; so ˚parākrama, ˚rūpa &c.
— laḥ The sesamum seed and plant (tilakavṛkṣa).
